title: restore: correctly set StartedTime
body:
A container restored from an exported checkpoint did not have its StartedTime set. Which resulted in a status like 'Up 292 years ago' after the restore.

This just sets the StartedTime to time.Now() if a container is restored from an exported checkpoint.
